---
title: "The impact of Mn and Al on the trapping and diffusion of hydrogen in γ-Fe: An atomistic insight"
author: ["Bikram Kumar Das", "Poulami Chakraborty", "Mingyuan Lu", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2024-09-19
publication: "International Journal of Hydrogen Energy, **83**, 731-744 (2024)."
categories: ["Hembrittlement"]
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1016/j.ijhydene.2024.06.322
url_preprint:
journ: "International Journal of Hydrogen Energy"
issue: 83
page: 731-744
year: 2024
image: featured.png
pub_number: 12

---
